page_title: Tsumi to Batsu - Inorazaru Mono yo
text:
is a song by Yoko Takahashi. 
It is the promotional song for the S.J.H.U. PROJECT Shin Universe Robo project. It is in the EVANGELION ETERNALLY single that was released on 10 May 2023.

amaetai to ieru nara

| width="33%" | 
From the merciless night
Comes the newborn monad
Crime and punishment, those who are unwilling to pray

In summer
The world in your eyes
Over and over again
dyes colorfully and squirms
Not to be deceived by that smile
An illusion manifests from our thoughts

Even if I extend
My hand and snatch it
Answers or whatever
Would not connect together

Yesterday, no matter how much it transforms
Feel the mystery going through the darkness
With those who are emotionally traumatized
From the merciless night
Comes the newborn monad
Crime and punishment, those who are unwilling to pray
 
Wither hastily
Whispers of the petals
Waft a mature scent
Like a kid who wants to worry everyone around
Find comfort in speaking the desire of
Being spoiled

The farthest
Memory and
A sham town
Begin to collapse and crumble

Tomorrow, even if we are going to die
An unfulfilled heart is nothing
But an afterimage no one can heal

Your eyes are drowning in tears
But no word would be enough
If it were me
I would hold your body tight
 
Vow to eternity
Fate of metempsychosis

Yesterday, no matter how much it transforms
Feel the mystery going through the darkness
With those who are emotionally traumatized
From the merciless night
Advances the newborn monad
Crime and punishment, those who are unwilling to pray
 
| width="33%" | 
無慈悲な夜から
生まれ来るモナド
罪と罰　祈らざる者よ、、、

夏の日に
あなたが観た世界は
幾重にも
染められ蠢いてる
微笑みに騙されてはいけない
思考が現実化する「幻」

手を伸ばし
奪っても
答えなど
紐付けられない

昨日、生まれ変わっても
傷ついた誰かと
闇を進む神秘　感じる
無慈悲な夜から
生まれ来るモナド
罪と罰　祈らざる者よ、、、

散り急ぐ
花びらの囁きは
大人びた香りを漂わせる
心配をかけたい子どものように
甘えたいと言えるなら
楽だね

最果ての
思い出と
偽物の
街が崩れて い く

明日、死んでしまっても
満たされぬ心は
誰にも癒せない残像

泣きじゃくる君は
言葉が足りない
私なら
抱きしめてあげる

永遠(とわ)に誓う
輪廻(りんね)の定め、、、

昨日、生まれ変わっても
傷ついた誰かと
闇を進む神秘　感じる
無慈悲な夜から
生まれ行くモナド
罪と罰　祈らざる者よ、、、
